title: ControlBox Property
description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a control box is displayed in the caption bar of the form.
notes:
If the ControlBox property is set to true, the control box is displayed in the upper-left corner of the caption bar. The control box can be used to close the form.

See Also: ControlBox Property
